introduction: Scattered papers lie across the desecrated altar, covered in dried blood and dark symbols.
You carefully gather the documents and begin to read:
'The Aethel Ore failed. Dimensional stability requires organic anchors. Human sacrifices are now required.'
'The Mayor's bloodline is old and strong. His family will serve as perfect catalysts for the portal awakening.'
'Once the barrier weakens, HE can return. The sleeper will wake. The old pact will be fulfilled.'
You take the documents with you as evidence. The Mayor needs to see this.
